name: Booking Branch — Approval Gate
description: Creates pending booking requests, notifies internal team, and sends visitor confirmation only after manual approval webhook decision.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "session_id": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.session_id }}",
  "lead_name": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.lead_name }}",
  "lead_email": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.email || '' }}",
  "lead_phone": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.phone_e164 || '' }}",
  "name": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.lead_name }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.phone_e164 || '' }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.email || '' }}",
  "meeting_purpose": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.meeting_purpose || '' }}",
  "visitor_need": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.visitor_need || '' }}",
  "requested_datetime": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.requested_datetime || '' }}",
  "booking_date": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.booking_date || '' }}",
  "booking_time": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.booking_time || '' }}",
  "status": "pending_approval",
  "approval_status": "pending",
  "source": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.source_label || $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.channel || 'website_voice' }}",
  "source_label": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.source_label || $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.channel || 'website_voice' }}",
  "entry_point": "voice_agent"
}

parameters.subject: =⏳ Pending Meeting Approval — {{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.lead_name }}
parameters.message:
=

طلب حجز جديد (Pending Approval)

الاسم: {{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.lead_name }}

الجوال: {{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.phone_e164 }}

الإيميل: {{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.email }}

الوقت المطلوب: {{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.requested_datetime || 'غير محدد' }}

سبب الاجتماع: {{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.meeting_purpose || '—' }}

للموافقة أرسل POST إلى /webhook/booking-approval مع القرار yes وبيانات العميل.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "name": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.lead_name }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.email }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.phone_e164 }}",
  "services_requested": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.meeting_purpose || 'consultation' }}",
  "source": "{{ $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.source_label || $('Validate Booking Request').item.json.channel || 'website_voice' }}",
  "hs_lead_status": "OPEN",
  "lifecycle_stage": "opportunity"
}

parameters.subject: =تأكيد موعدك مع زيادة سيستم
parameters.message:
=

تم تأكيد طلب اجتماعك

أهلاً {{ $json.lead_name || $json.full_name || 'عميلنا الكريم' }}،

تمت الموافقة على طلبك، وفريق زيادة سيستم سيتواصل معك قريباً لتأكيد التفاصيل النهائية.

موعدك المطلوب: {{ $json.requested_datetime || 'سيتم تحديده بالتواصل المباشر' }}

شكراً لثقتك بزيادة سيستم.
